title: Green Food For A Queen
content:
I was gathering
    Leaves of the Wakana
    In springtime.
    Why did the snow fall
    On my dress?

    From the Japanese of the Mikado Ko-ko Ten-no, (ninth century).
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator), titled "Green Food For A Queen", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
